NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT 1200 TAYLOR APARTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM APPELLANT DOCKER, BLAINE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,111.00, THIS AMOUNT OF $5,000 IS NEW MONEY. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE UNPAID RENT AND DAMAGE TO THE SUBJECT PREMISES EXCEED THE COMBINED AMOUNT OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT ($4,595.00) AND THE JURISDICTIONAL MAXIMUM FOR THIS SMALL CLAIMS MATTER ($5,000.00). TOTAL DAMAGES EXCEEDED $10,000.00 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Adam B. Stirrup, Esq., for and with Appellant/Defendant Blaine Docker.
Shaban Shakoori, Esq., Respondent/Plaintiff appears on his own behalf as Manager of 1200 Taylor Apartments, LLC and not acting as an attorney.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Shaban Shakoori testifies on behalf of 1200 Taylor Apartments, LLC. Prior documentary evidence is re-introduced.

Blaine Docker testifies on his own behalf. Witness John Prescott White testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Plaintiff's exhibits retained.

Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, not reported (D318)
